name: openbridge
description: Rafiki-based Open Payments account provider issuing real wallet addresses to Nigerian, UK, and US accounts. Built for the Interledger Open Payments Accelerator 2026.
author: Marvy Nwaokobia <marvynwaokobia@gmail.com>

scripts.rafiki:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis rafiki-backend rafiki-auth
scripts.rafiki:migrate: docker compose exec rafiki-backend npm run knex -- migrate:latest
scripts.rafiki:seed: docker compose exec rafiki-backend npm run knex -- seed:run
